violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wood framing and supports and framing under the sink sink area are bare wood.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wood supports under the counter are bare wood. Need to be painted or sealed.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
